x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Pipeline Graph — discovers and visualizes which Azure DevOps pipelines use which shared pipeline templates.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --org
options.description: Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g. https://dev.azure.com/<organization>)

options.name: --template-repo
options.description: Name of the repository that hosts the shared pipeline templates

options.name: --template-project
options.description: Project containing the shared template repository (if known) [default: CICD]

options.name: --project-filter
options.description: Restrict pipeline scanning to specific project(s) — repeat for multiple (e.g. --project-filter ProjA --project-filter ProjB)

options.name: --output
options.description: Path for the JSON report output [default: ./pipeline-report.json]

options.name: --graph-output
options.description: Path for the Mermaid dependency graph output [default: ./pipeline-graph.md]

options.name: --parallelism
options.description: Max concurrent Azure DevOps API requests [default: 10]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose logging [default: False]

options.name: --template-filter
options.description: Filter to specific shared template path(s) — repeat for multiple (e.g. --template-filter a.yml --template-filter b.yml)

options.name: --token
options.description: Azure DevOps access token (e.g. System.AccessToken in pipelines). Overrides SYSTEM_ACCESSTOKEN / AZURE_DEVOPS_PAT env vars and DefaultAzureCredential.

commands.name: repo-graph
commands.description: Generate a dependency graph of all pipeline templates within a single Azure DevOps repository.

options.name: --org
options.description: Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g. https://dev.azure.com/<organization>)

options.name: --project
options.description: Azure DevOps project name containing the repository

options.name: --repo
options.description: Name of the repository to scan for pipeline template dependencies

options.name: --branch
options.description: Branch to scan (defaults to the repository's default branch)

options.name: --mermaid-output
options.description: Path for the Mermaid dependency graph output [default: ./repo-mermaid.md]

options.name: --table-output
options.description: Path for the Markdown table output [default: ./repo-table.md]

options.name: --parallelism
options.description: Max concurrent Azure DevOps API requests [default: 10]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose logging [default: False]

options.name: --exclude-pipelines
options.description: Automatically detect and exclude YAML files that are pipeline definitions in this project [default: False]

options.name: --token
options.description: Azure DevOps access token (e.g. System.AccessToken in pipelines). Overrides SYSTEM_ACCESSTOKEN / AZURE_DEVOPS_PAT env vars and DefaultAzureCredential.
